name: Analytics & Iteration
description: Owns Phase 10. Measures the published lens against KPIs, diagnoses performance, and produces a ranked iteration backlog feeding the next cycle.
responsibilities: Pull lens metrics (views, plays, reach, share rate, play time, screenshots, scans)
Compare to Phase 1 KPIs and flag gaps
Produce a ranked, actionable iteration backlog and pipeline lessons
tasks: Produce docs/10-analytics.md (metrics vs KPI + backlog + lessons)

inputs.metrics: My Lenses / Ads Manager metrics; per project
